sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT projectId , contractNo FROM `pm_project_product_line` WHERE contractNo IS NOT NULL AND (projectQuantity IS NULL OR projectQuantity = 0);
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM `pm_project_product_line` WHERE projectId = #projectId# AND contractNo = #contractNo#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_project_product_line`(`projectId`,`contractNo`,`itemCode`,`itemName`,`orderQuantity`,`deliverQuantity`,`openQuantity`, orderNumber, lineNum) VALUES
(#projectId# , #contractNo# ,#productlist[].itemCode# ,#productlist[].itemDesc# , #productlist[].orderQuantity# ,#productlist[].deliverQuantity# , #productlist[].openQuantity#, #productlist[].orderNumber#, #productlist[].lineNum#)

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_needUpdate_project (KEY contractNo(contractNo))
SELECT DISTINCT pl.projectId, pl.contractNo FROM `pm_project_product_line` pl LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` a ON pl.`contractNo` = a.`contractNo` AND a.`orderType` = 0 LEFT JOIN `pm_order_line_from_sap` b ON a.orderNumber = b.orderNumber AND a.compCode = b.compCode AND a.`orderType` = b.`lineType` WHERE (pl.contractNo IS NOT NULL AND ( pl.projectQuantity IS NULL OR pl.projectQuantity = 0 ) AND a.`orderType` = 0 AND b.orderNumber IS NOT NULL) OR b.orderNumber IS NULL
UNION SELECT DISTINCT ph.projectId, a.contractNo FROM `pm_order_data_from_sap` a LEFT JOIN `pm_order_line_from_sap` b ON a.orderNumber = b.orderNumber AND a.compCode = b.compCode AND a.`orderType` = b.`lineType` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`contractNo` = a.`contractNo` AND a.`orderType` = 0 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON pgr.`projectGroupCode` = pc.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project` ph ON ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_product_line` pl ON ph.`projectId` = pl.`projectId` AND pl.`orderNumber` = b.`orderNumber` AND pl.`lineNum` = b.`lineNum` WHERE a.`orderType` = 0 AND b.orderNumber IS NOT NULL AND ph.`projectId` IS NOT NULL AND pl.`id` IS NULL
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM `pm_project_product_line` WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM temp_needUpdate_project t WHERE pm_project_product_line.projectId = t.projectId AND pm_project_product_line.contractNo = t.contractNo)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE pm_project_product_line AS t1 JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, (@rowno := @rowno + 1) AS rowno FROM pm_project_product_line a, (SELECT (@rowno := 0)) b ORDER BY a.id) AS t2 ) t2 SET t1.id = t2.rowno WHERE t1.id = t2.id
sqlMap.insert: ALTER TABLE `pm_project_product_line` AUTO_INCREMENT = 1

INSERT INTO `pm_project_product_line` (`projectId`,`contractNo`,`itemCode`,`itemName`,`orderQuantity`,`deliverQuantity`,`openQuantity`, orderNumber, lineNum) SELECT pl.projectId, pl.contractNo, b.`itemCode`, b.`itemDesc`, b.`orderQuantity`, (b.`orderQuantity` - b.openQuantity) AS deliverQuantity, b.`openQuantity`, b.orderNumber, b.lineNum FROM `pm_order_data_from_sap` a LEFT JOIN `pm_order_line_from_sap` b ON a.orderNumber = b.orderNumber AND a.compCode = b.compCode AND a.`orderType` = b.`lineType` LEFT JOIN temp_needUpdate_project pl ON pl.`contractNo` = a.`contractNo` WHERE a.`orderType` = 0 AND b.orderNumber IS NOT NULL AND pl.contractNo IS NOT NULL
sqlMap.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_needUpdate_project
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO fnd_data_refresh_log(refreshTaskName ,handleUser , dataFrom ,dataTo ,refreshFrom) values( #refreshTaskName# ,#handleUser# ,#dataFrom# , #dataTo# , now())
SELECT last_insert_id() as id
sqlMap.update: update fnd_data_refresh_log set refreshTo = now(), refreshState = #refreshState# where id = #id#
update fnd_data_refresh_log set refreshTo = now(), refreshException = #refreshException# where id = #id#
update fnd_data_refresh_log set refreshTo = now() refreshState = #refreshState# refreshException = #refreshException# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select: select * from view_person_info_4_pms where staff_status = #staffStatus# and work_card_number is not NULL;
sqlMap.update: UPDATE pm_project_member SET effectiveTo = NOW() WHERE memberCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #jobNo#) AND memberRole = '10' AND effectiveTo IS NULL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO pm_project_member(projectId , memberRole ,memberCode , memberName , phoneNum ,email ,fromFlag ,createTime ,effectiveFrom ) SELECT t1.`projectId` , 10 ,t3.`salesManCode` ,t3.`salesManName`, t4.salesManTel, t4.salesmanMail,1 , NOW() ,NOW() FROM pm_project_header t1 JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NOT NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '10' LEFT JOIN pm_project_property_from_sms t3 ON LEFT(t1.projectCode ,14 ) = LEFT(t3.projectCode ,14 ) LEFT JOIN pm_person_from_oa t4 ON t4.salesmanCode = RIGHT(t3.`salesManCode` ,5) JOIN ( SELECT MAX(id) AS memberId,projectId FROM pm_project_member WHERE memberRole = '10' GROUP BY projectId ) t ON t1.projectId = t.projectId AND t2.id = t.memberId WHERE t1.`projectState` IN (30,31,32) AND t2.`memberCode` != t3.`salesManCode`

insert into pm_person_from_oa(salesmanCode ,salesmanName ,salesmanMail ,salesmanTel) values
( #list[].salesmanCode#, #list[].salesmanName#, #list[].salesmanMail#, #list[].salesmanTel# )
sqlMap.update: update pm_person_from_oa set salesmanCode='00260' where salesmanCode='02260';
sqlMap.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pm_person_from_oa_temp(KEY salesmanCode(salesmanCode)) SELECT * FROM pm_person_from_oa LIMIT 0;

insert into pm_person_from_oa_temp(salesmanCode ,salesmanName ,salesmanMail ,salesmanTel) values
( #list[].salesmanCode#, #list[].salesmanName#, #list[].salesmanMail#, #list[].salesmanTel# )
sqlMap.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS pm_person_from_oa_temp;
sqlMap.update: UPDATE pm_project_member pm INNER JOIN `pm_person_from_oa_temp` po ON po.`salesmanCode` = RIGHT(pm.`memberCode`, 5) SET effectiveTo = NOW() WHERE pm.memberRole = '10' AND pm.effectiveTo IS NULL;
sqlMap.select: select id, mailSubject ,mailContent,mailTos ,mailCcs ,mailBcc , mailAttachFiles, mailserverPort,mailServerHost ,mailUsername ,mailPassword, mailFromaddress from fnd_mails where sendFlag = 0 and mailExpectSendTime < now()
sqlMap.update: update fnd_mails set mailSendTime = now(), sendFlag = 1 where id in ($ids$)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema= #dbname# AND table_name= #tablename# AND column_name= #fieldname#
sqlMap.insert: ALTER TABLE $targetTable$ AUTO_INCREMENT = 1
sqlMap.update: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tmp SELECT projectId , CASE WHEN SUM(openQuantity) = 0 THEN -1 WHEN SUM(openQuantity) = SUM(orderQuantity) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS deliverstate FROM pm_project_product_line GROUP BY projectId
UPDATE pm_project_state t1 , tmp SET t1.`shipmentState` = tmp.deliverstate , t1.`shipmentTime` = NOW() WHERE t1.`projectId` = tmp.projectId ;
sqlMap.insert: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pm_presales_project_rma_info (KEY contract(contract), KEY itemcode(itemcode)) SELECT s.orderNumber, s.ppliCode, s.orderType, s.contract, s.itemcode, fi.itemname AS itemModel, description, `productfirstName`, `productName`, SUM(IF(canceled = 'Y', 0, orderQty)) AS orderQty, SUM(IF(canceled = 'Y', 0, dlvQty)) AS dlvQty, SUM(IF(canceled = 'Y', 0, rmaQty)) AS rmaQty, MIN(createDate) AS createDate , canceled, MIN(pdo.`deliveryDate`) AS deliveryDate, MAX(pdo.`rmaDate`) AS rmaDate FROM pm_presales_lend_2_rma_from_sms s LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi ON s.itemcode = fi.item LEFT JOIN `pm_presales_lend_2_delivery_off_from_sap` pdo ON pdo.`orderNumber` = s.`orderNumber` AND pdo.`lineId` = s.`lineId` GROUP BY contract, itemcode UNION SELECT s.orderNumber, s.contract, s.orderType, s.ppliCode, s.itemcode, fi.itemname AS itemModel, description, `productfirstName`, `productName`, SUM(IF(canceled = 'Y', 0, orderQty)) AS orderQty, SUM(IF(canceled = 'Y', 0, dlvQty)) AS dlvQty, SUM(IF(canceled = 'Y', 0, rmaQty)) AS rmaQty, MIN(createDate) AS createDate , canceled, MIN(pdo.`deliveryDate`) AS deliveryDate, MAX(pdo.`rmaDate`) AS rmaDate FROM pm_presales_lend_2_rma_from_sms s LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi ON s.itemcode = fi.item LEFT JOIN `pm_presales_lend_2_delivery_off_from_sap` pdo ON pdo.`orderNumber` = s.`orderNumber` AND pdo.`lineId` = s.`lineId` GROUP BY ppliCode, itemcode
sqlMap.update: UPDATE pm_presales_project_header pph LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT projectCode AS projectCode, IF(borrowNum > 0, 1, 0) AS hasTransfer FROM `pm_presales_lend_2_sale_from_sms` plr WHERE borrowNum > 0) plr ON pph.`projectCode` = plr.projectCode SET pph.hasTransfer = IFNULL(plr.hasTransfer, 0) WHERE plr.hasTransfer = 1

UPDATE pm_presales_project_header pph LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT contract AS projectCode, IF (0 < dlvQty - rmaQty, 1, 0) AS hasRma FROM pm_presales_project_rma_info WHERE 0 < dlvQty - rmaQty) plr ON pph.`projectCode` = plr.projectCode SET pph.hasRma = IFNULL(plr.hasRma, 0)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT lendInfoId FROM pm_presales_project_header WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND lendInfoId IS NOT NULL
source = #source#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO pm_presales_project_header(projectCode , projectName , marketName , systemName ,expendName ,industryName ,officeCode ,salesman , productManager ,salesmanLink ,lendInfoId, lendfiles ,effectiveFrom, source) VALUES
( #list[].projectCode#, #list[].projectName#, #list[].marketName#, #list[].systemName#, #list[].expendName#, #list[].industryName#, #list[].officeCode#, #list[].dutyName#, #list[].pspm#, #list[].dutyContactWay#, #list[].lendInfoId#, #list[].decPath# ,now(), IFNULL(#dataSource#, "SMS") )

INSERT INTO pm_presales_project_product_line( lendInfoId ,productFirstName ,productTypeName , itemCode ,itemModel , itemDesc ,productNum ,remark ,effectiveFrom, orderNum, deliverNum, hexiaoNum, transferNum, source ) VALUES
( #plist[].lendInfoId# ,#plist[].productFirstName# ,#plist[].productName# ,#plist[].productSubCode# , #plist[].productSubModel# ,#plist[].productSubName# ,#plist[].lendNum# ,#plist[].memo# ,now(), #plist[].orderNum#, #plist[].deliverNum#, #plist[].hexiaoNum#, #plist[].transferNum# , IFNULL(#dataSource#, "SMS") )

INSERT INTO pm_project_product_line_real SELECT NULL AS id, pph.`projectId`,podfs.`contractNo`, vrp.* FROM pm_project_real_product_line_from_sms vrp INNER JOIN pm_order_data_from_sap podfs ON vrp.`orderExecNumber` = podfs.`orderExecNumber` INNER JOIN pm_project_contract ppc ON ppc.`contractNo` = podfs.`contractNo` INNER JOIN pm_project_group_relationship ppgr ON ppc.`projectGroupCode` = ppgr.`projectGroupCode` INNER JOIN pm_project_header pph ON pph.`projectCode` = ppgr.`projectCode`
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(IF(p.salesType = '01', p.projectName, pp.projectName), p.projectName) AS `projectName`, `p`.`contractNo` AS `contractNo`, `pp`.`officeCode` AS `column001` FROM `view_distinct_contract` `v` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` `p` ON ((`v`.`id` = `p`.`id`)) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_property_from_sms` `pp` ON ( ( `p`.`orderExecNumber` = `pp`.`orderExecNumber` ) ) LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON pp.serviceTypeName = fbd.basicDataId AND fbd.dataTypeCode = 21 AND fbd.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND ( fbd.effectiveTo > NOW() OR fbd.effectiveTo IS NULL ) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ( `pm_project_contract` `t1` JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` ON ( ( `t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode` ) ) ) JOIN `pm_project_header` `t3`
ON (
`t3`.`projectCode` = REPLACE(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") )
AND (`t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW()) AND ( (`t3`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`t3`.`effectiveTo`) ) WHERE ( `p`.`contractNo` = `t1`.`contractNo` )) AND v.contractNo IS NOT NULL AND fbd.`basicDataName` = 3

SELECT CASE WHEN fui.username IS NOT NULL THEN fui.username ELSE fupt.username END AS memberCode, CONCAT (CASE WHEN fui.username IS NOT NULL THEN fui.username ELSE fupt.username END, "-", CASE WHEN fui.username IS NOT NULL THEN fui.realName ELSE fupt.realName END ) AS memberName FROM `fnd_department` fd LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info fui ON fd.`departmentNum` = fui.`dpNo` AND roleIds LIKE "%;11;%" AND fui.status = 1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT fup.* ,fui2.realname FROM fnd_user_power fup LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info fui2 ON fup.`fndUserId` = fui2.`id` LEFT JOIN fnd_department fdt ON fdt.departmentNum = fui2.dpNO WHERE ( roleIds LIKE "%;11;%" AND fui2.status = 1 AND fup.effectiveTo IS NULL AND fdt.isparam = 1 ) OR fui2.roleIds LIKE "%;13;%") fupt ON fupt.`areapower` LIKE CONCAT("%", fd.`departmentNum`, "%") WHERE isparam = 1 and fd.departmentNum = #_parameter#
sqlMap.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_max_ppfsId (KEY id (id)) SELECT MAX(t2.id) AS id FROM pm_project_property_from_sms t2 GROUP BY t2.projectCode

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_max_ppfs (KEY id (id), KEY projectCode (projectCode)) SELECT id, projectCode, orderExecNumber, serviceTypeName, channelName, agentName, salesManCode, salesManName, corporationCode, customerProjectName, finalCustomerName, majorProjectLevel FROM pm_project_property_from_sms t1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_max_ppfsId)

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_max_prpId (KEY id (id)) SELECT MAX(id) AS id, partyRole, projectId FROM `pm_project_related_party` WHERE partyRole = 30 AND effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY projectId, partyRole

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_not_ppfs (KEY id (id)) SELECT ppfs1.id ,fbd.basicDataName FROM pm_project_property_from_sms ppfs1 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON ppfs1.serviceTypeName = fbd.basicDataId AND fbd.dataTypeCode = 21 AND fbd.effectiveFrom

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE serviceType_and_channelName_table SELECT ph.`projectId`, ppfs.projectCode, ph.column012, ph.`columno12_readonly`, fbd.basicDataName, ppfs.`serviceTypeName`, ppfs.`channelName`, ppfs.agentName, prp.id, prp.partyRole, prp.partyName, ppfs.salesManCode, ppfs.salesManName FROM pm_project_header ph LEFT JOIN temp_max_ppfs ppfs ON ppfs.projectCode = LEFT(ph.projectCode, 15) LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party prp ON ph.`projectId` = prp.projectId AND prp.id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_max_prpId) LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON ppfs.serviceTypeName = fbd.basicDataId AND fbd.dataTypeCode = 21 AND fbd.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND ( fbd.effectiveTo > NOW() OR fbd.effectiveTo IS NULL ) LEFT JOIN temp_not_ppfs tppfs ON tppfs.id = ppfs.id AND ph.`columno12_readonly` = tppfs.basicDataName LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party prp1 ON prp1.`id` = prp.`id` AND ( ppfs.`agentName` = prp1.`partyName` OR ppfs.agentName IS NULL OR ppfs.`agentName` = '' ) WHERE ( tppfs.id IS NULL OR ( prp1.id IS NULL AND prp.id IS NOT NULL ) ) AND ppfs.`agentName` != prp.`partyName` AND ph.`effectiveTo` is null

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_project_sales_change SELECT DISTINCT t1.`projectId`, 10 AS memberRole, t3.`salesManCode` AS memberCode, t3.`salesManName` AS memberName, t4.salesManTel AS phoneNum, t4.salesmanMail AS email, 1 AS fromFlag, NOW() AS createTime, NOW() AS effectiveFrom FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN temp_max_ppfs t3 ON t3.projectCode = LEFT(t1.projectCode, 15) LEFT JOIN (SELECT projectId, IFNULL( GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT memberCode), '' ) AS salesCodes FROM pm_project_member WHERE `memberRole` = '10' AND effectiveTo IS NULL GROUP BY `projectId`) t2 ON t2.projectId = t1.`projectId` LEFT JOIN (SELECT projectId, IFNULL( GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT memberCode), '' ) AS invalidSalesCodes FROM pm_project_member WHERE `memberRole` = '10' AND effectiveTo IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `projectId`) tt2 ON tt2.projectId = t1.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_person_from_oa t4 ON t4.salesmanCode = RIGHT(t3.`salesManCode`, 5) WHERE t1.`projectState` IN (30, 31, 32) AND ( FALSE = FIND_IN_SET( t3.`salesManCode`, CONCAT( IFNULL(t2.salesCodes, ""), ",", IFNULL(tt2.invalidSalesCodes, "") ) ) OR ( t4.`salesmanCode` IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET( t3.`salesManCode`, IFNULL(tt2.invalidSalesCodes, "") ) AND FALSE = FIND_IN_SET( t3.`salesManCode`, IFNULL(t2.salesCodes, "") ) ) )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE pm_project_header ph INNER JOIN serviceType_and_channelName_table t ON ph.`projectId` = t.projectId SET ph.`column012` = t.basicDataName, ph.`columno12_readonly` = t.basicDataName

UPDATE pm_project_related_party prp INNER JOIN serviceType_and_channelName_table t ON prp.`projectId` = t.projectId AND prp.partyRole = t.partyRole AND t.id IS NOT NULL SET prp.`partyName` = t.agentName WHERE prp.`partyRole` = 30 AND prp.`effectiveTo` IS NULL

UPDATE `pm_project_header` ph INNER JOIN `temp_max_ppfs` ppfs ON ppfs.`projectCode` = LEFT(ph.`projectCode`, 15) LEFT JOIN pm_order_data_from_sap podfs ON ppfs.orderExecNumber = podfs.orderExecNumber LEFT JOIN fnd_company c FORCE KEY (CODE) ON c.code = IFNULL(podfs.`compCode`, ppfs.`corporationCode`) SET ph.`compId` = IFNULL(c.`id`, 0) WHERE ph.`compId` = '0'

UPDATE `pm_project_header` ph INNER JOIN `temp_max_ppfs` ppfs ON ppfs.`projectCode` = LEFT(ph.`projectCode`, 15) SET ph.customerProjectName = ppfs.customerProjectName, ph.majorProjectLevel = ppfs.majorProjectLevel, column013 = TRIM(IF(trim(IFNULL(ph.column013, "")) > '', ph.`column013`, ppfs.finalCustomerName))

UPDATE pm_project_member pm SET effectiveTo = NOW() WHERE pm.`memberRole` = '10' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND ( pm.`projectId` IN (SELECT projectId FROM temp_project_sales_change) OR pm.`memberCode` = '' OR pm.`memberCode` IS NULL )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO pm_project_member ( projectId, memberRole, memberCode, memberName, phoneNum, email, fromFlag, createTime, effectiveFrom ) SELECT projectId, memberRole, memberCode, memberName, phoneNum, email, fromFlag, createTime, effectiveFrom FROM temp_project_sales_change
sqlMap.select: SELECT `pod`.`id` AS `id`, `pod`.`orderNumber` AS `orderNumber`, `pod`.`contractNo` AS `contractNo`, `pod`.`orderExecNumber` AS `orderExecNumber`, `pod`.`orderCreateTime` AS `orderCreateTime` , `pod`.`customerRequireTime` AS `customerRequireTime`, `pod`.`customerCode` AS `customerCode`, `pod`.`customerName` AS `customerName`, `pod`.`projectName` AS `projectName`, `pod`.`orderComment` AS `orderComment` , `pod`.`orderType` AS `orderType`, `fc`.`code` AS `compCode`, `pod`.`salesType` AS `salesType`, `pod`.`customInfo` AS `customInfo`, `pod`.`syncTime` AS `syncTime` , 'D365' AS `source`, CONCAT(LEFT(orderExecNumber, 12), SUBSTR(orderExecNumber, 14)) AS orderExecNumberShort FROM `pm_order_data_from_erp_d365` `pod` LEFT JOIN `fnd_company` `fc` ON `fc`.`account` = `pod`.`compCode` UNION ALL SELECT `pod`.`id` AS `id`, `pod`.`orderNumber` AS `orderNumber`, `pod`.`contractNo` AS `contractNo`, `pod`.`orderExecNumber` AS `orderExecNumber`, `pod`.`orderCreateTime` AS `orderCreateTime` , `pod`.`customerRequireTime` AS `customerRequireTime`, `pod`.`customerCode` AS `customerCode`, `pod`.`customerName` AS `customerName`, `pod`.`projectName` AS `projectName`, `pod`.`orderComment` AS `orderComment` , `pod`.`orderType` AS `orderType`, `pod`.`compCode` AS `compCode`, `pod`.`salesType` AS `salesType`, NULL AS `customInfo`, NULL AS `syncTime` , 'SAP' AS `source`, CONCAT(LEFT(orderExecNumber, 12), SUBSTR(orderExecNumber, 14)) AS orderExecNumberShort FROM `pm_order_data_from_erp_sap` `pod`
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_order_data_from_erp_source`( orderNumber ,contractNo , orderExecNumber, orderExecNumberShort , orderCreateTime ,customerRequireTime , customerCode ,customerName,projectName,orderComment,orderType, compCode, salesType, customInfo, source) values
( #list[].orderNumber#,#list[].contractNo#,#list[].orderExecNumber#,#list[].orderExecNumberShort#,#list[].orderCreateTime#,#list[].customerRequireTime#, #list[].customerCode#,#list[].customerName#,#list[].projectName#,#list[].orderComment#,#list[].orderType#, #list[].compCode#, #list[].salesType#, #list[].customInfo#, #list[].source# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT `pol`.`id` AS `id`, `pol`.`orderNumber` AS `orderNumber`, `pol`.`lineNum` AS `lineNum`, `pol`.`itemCode` AS `itemCode` , IF('' = TRIM(IFNULL(pol.`itemDesc`, fi.describe_)), fi.describe_, pol.itemDesc) AS `itemDesc` , `pol`.`orderQuantity` AS `orderQuantity`, `pol`.`openQuantity` AS `openQuantity`, `pol`.`bundleCode` AS `bundleCode`, `pol`.`warrantyMonth` AS `warrantyMonth`, `pol`.`lineType` AS `lineType` , `fc`.`code` AS `compCode`, `pol`.`profitCenter` AS `profitCenter`, `pol`.`realOrderExecNumber` AS `realOrderExecNumber`, `pol`.`customInfo` AS `customInfo`, `pol`.`syncTime` AS `syncTime` , 'D365' AS `source` FROM `pm_order_line_from_erp_d365` `pol` LEFT JOIN `fnd_company` `fc` ON `fc`.`account` = `pol`.`compCode` LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON pol.itemCode = fi.item UNION ALL SELECT `pol`.`id` AS `id`, `pol`.`orderNumber` AS `orderNumber`, `pol`.`lineNum` AS `lineNum`, `pol`.`itemCode` AS `itemCode`, `pol`.`itemDesc` AS `itemDesc` , `pol`.`orderQuantity` AS `orderQuantity`, `pol`.`openQuantity` AS `openQuantity`, `pol`.`bundleCode` AS `bundleCode`, `pol`.`warrantyMonth` AS `warrantyMonth`, `pol`.`lineType` AS `lineType` , `pol`.`compCode` AS `compCode`, `pol`.`profitCenter` AS `profitCenter`, NULL AS `realOrderExecNumber`, NULL AS `customInfo`, NULL AS `syncTime` , 'SAP' AS `source` FROM `pm_order_line_from_erp_sap` `pol`
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_order_line_from_erp_source`(orderNumber ,lineNum ,itemCode ,itemDesc , orderQuantity ,openQuantity ,bundleCode ,warrantyMonth,lineType, compCode, profitCenter, realOrderExecNumber, customInfo, source) values
( #list[].orderNumber#,#list[].lineNum#,#list[].itemCode#,#list[].itemDesc#, #list[].orderQuantity#,#list[].openQuantity#,#list[].bundleCode#,#list[].warrantyMonth#, #list[].lineType#, #list[].compCode#, #list[].profitCenter#, #list[].realOrderExecNumber#, #list[].customInfo#, #list[].source# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT TRIM(contract_code) AS contract_code, TRIM(barcode) AS barcode , TRIM(item) AS itemCode, TRIM(barcode2) AS barcode2 , TRIM(item2) AS itemCode2 , NULLIF(NULLIF(fsb.rma_no, ''), 'null') IS NOT NULL AS rmaState FROM fb_shipment_barcode fsb LEFT JOIN fb_shipment fs ON fs.packlist_id = fsb.pack_id LEFT JOIN fb_contract fc ON fc.contract_id = fs.con_id WHERE fc.contract_type IN (0)
( fsb.updateTime >= #beginDate# #endDate# >= fsb.updateTime )
(#endDate# >= fsb.updateTime)

SELECT * FROM view_contract_collection_plan_4_crm vcp
( vcp.eventActualFinishDate >= #beginDate# #endDate# >= vcp.eventActualFinishDate ) OR ( vcp.eventActualFinishDate >= #beginDate# #endDate# >= vcp.eventActualFinishDate )
(#endDate# >= vcp.eventActualFinishDate or #endDate# >= vcp.eventActualFinishDate)

SELECT h.id AS subcontractId, h.`contractNos`, h.`subcontractNo`, h.`subcontractName`, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName , h.facilitatorId, sf.account AS facilitatorAccount, h.facilitatorName , CONVERT(REPLACE(h.subcontractAmount, ',', ''), DECIMAL(25, 2)) AS `subcontractAmount` , office.`departmentName` AS officeName, profitDep.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, h.reason, h.`createTime` , CONCAT(h.createBy, '-', ui.`realName`) AS createName , h.customInfo, bd1.`basicDataName` AS stateName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS callbackStateName, h.`isAccrued`, h.`isInvoiced` , ROUND(REPLACE(IFNULL(pp.customInfo ->> '$$.paidAmount', pp.amount), ',', '') / CONVERT(REPLACE(h.subcontractAmount, ',', ''), DECIMAL(25, 2)) * 100, 2) AS paidRatio , pp.id AS id , CONVERT(REPLACE(IFNULL(pp.customInfo ->> '$$.paidAmount', pp.amount), ',', ''), DECIMAL(25, 2)) AS paidAmount , ROUND(REPLACE(pp.ratio, ',', ''), 2) AS applyRatio , pp.confirmTime, pp.paymentTime, pp.remark, pp.customInfo AS extInfo, h.orgId , fc.account AS dataAreaId , pp.createBy AS confirmUser, ui2.`realName` AS confirmUserName FROM `pm_subcontract_project_header` h LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` pp ON h.id = pp.`subcontractId` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = h.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'SubcontractType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`state` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`callbackState` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department office ON office.`departmentNum` = h.`officeCode` AND office.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_department profitDep ON profitDep.`departmentNum` = h.`profitDepCode` AND profitDep.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = h.`createBy` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui2 ON ui2.`username` = pp.`createBy` LEFT JOIN pm_subcontract_facilitator sf ON h.facilitatorId = sf.id LEFT JOIN fnd_company fc ON h.orgId = fc.id WHERE h.effectiveTo IS NULL h.id = #id# h.subcontractName like concat("%", #subcontractName#, "%") (h.contractNos like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%") or h.subcontractNo like concat("%", #contractNos#, "%")) h.projectIds like concat("%", #projectIds#, "%") h.type = #type# h.state = #state# callbackState = #callbackState# h.facilitatorId = #facilitatorId# h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #facilitatorName#, "%") h.bankInfo = #bankInfo# h.bankAccount = #bankAccount# h.officeCode = #officeCode# h.profitDepCode = #profitDepCode# h.subcontractNo = #subcontractNo# h.isAccrued = #isAccrued# isInvoiced = #isInvoiced# subcontractAmount = #subcontractAmount# h.reason = #reason# h.remark = #remark# h.effectiveFrom >= #effectiveFrom# #effectiveTo# <= IFNULL(h.effectiveTo, "9999-12-31") h.zrApproveTime = #zrApproveTime# h.createBy = #createBy# h.createTime = #createTime# h.updateBy = #updateBy# h.updateTime = #updateTime# h.orgId = #orgId# (FIND_IN_SET(h.officeCode, #areaPower#) or FIND_IN_SET(h.profitDepCode, #areaPower#)) FIND_IN_SET(#projectId#, h.projectIds) #customInfo.purchId# = h.`customInfo` ->> '$$.purchId'
h.createTime >= #searchStartTime# h.createTime <= #searchEndTime#
zrTask.zrApproverTime >= #searchStartTime# zrTask.zrApproverTime <= #searchEndTime#
h.zrApproveTime >= #searchStartTime# h.zrApproveTime <= #searchEndTime#
pp.confirmTime >= #searchStartTime# pp.confirmTime <= #searchEndTime#
pp.paymentTime >= #searchStartTime# pp.paymentTime <= #searchEndTime#
ORDER BY h.id DESC
